---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels:
  - enhancement
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Provide a short and clear description of the feature.

---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

Example:

> "I'm always frustrated when..."

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

Explain:

- What should be added?
- How should it work?
- What should the API look like (if applicable)?

Example:

```ts
// Example API
hasPermission(user, "dashboard.view");
```

---

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

---

## Use Case

Explain why this feature would be useful.

Example:

- Enterprise applications
- Admin dashboard
- Multi-tenant system
- RBAC implementation

---

## Possible Breaking Changes

Will this feature change existing behavior?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (please explain)

If yes, describe the impact.

---

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, links, or any other relevant information.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and feature requests.
- [ ] This feature does not already exist.
- [ ] I explained the use case.
- [ ] I provided enough information to understand the request.
